script:
set +e
echo '=== full mount listing (relevant) ==='
mount 2>&1 | grep -vE 'tmpfs|proc|sysfs|cgroup|devpts|mqueue|tracefs|debugfs|fusectl|configfs|securityfs|hugetlbfs|pstore|bpf|systemd-1|/dev/sda1' | head -40
echo '=== findmnt /home recursive ==='
findmnt -R /home 2>&1 | head -40
echo '=== find any bindfs / fuse processes ==='
pgrep -af 'bindfs|fuse' 2>&1 | head -10
echo '=== test: touch master then check aixa file mtime ==='
touch /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
stat -c 'master  mtime=%Y %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
stat -c 'aixa    mtime=%Y %n' /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
stat -c 'afrah   mtime=%Y %n' /home/afrah/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
stat -c 'heather mtime=%Y %n' /home/heather/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== sample mskai responder unit drop-ins ==='
ls /etc/systemd/system/aixa-responder.service.d/ 2>&1
cat /etc/systemd/system/aixa-responder.service.d/*.conf 2>&1 | head -20
systemctl show aixa-responder.service -p User,Group,DynamicUser,RootDirectory,MountAPIVFS,PrivateUsers,BindPaths,BindReadOnlyPaths 2>&1
echo '===END==='
